description: Backend: Add context_summary JSONB field to ChatSession model + migration
steps: Add context_summary: Column(JSONB, nullable=True) to ChatSession in models.py
Add summarized_up_to: Column(Integer, nullable=True) for tracking last summarized message
Create Alembic migration: alembic revision --autogenerate -m 'add context_summary to chat_sessions'
Apply migration: alembic upgrade head
Run existing tests to verify no regression: pytest tests/ -v
Commit

description: Backend: Implement context_agent.py — async context summarization with cheap model
steps: Create backend/app/agents/context_agent.py
Implement summarize_context(messages, previous_summary) that calls a cheap LLM
Output format: {topics, pending, mood, key_facts, summarized_up_to}
Implement should_summarize(session) — returns True when unsummarized messages >= 5
Implement trigger_summary_if_needed(session_id, db) — async, non-blocking
Add CONTEXT_MODEL setting to config.py for cheap model selection
Write test: tests/test_context_agent.py — mock LLM, verify summary structure
Run test: pytest tests/test_context_agent.py -v
Commit

description: Backend: Refactor prompt building — cache-friendly order + context compression
steps: Create backend/app/agents/prompts_v2.py with new prompt builder
Prompt order: (1) tool definitions + decision tree, (2) pet profiles, (3) session summary, (4) recent 3-5 raw messages, (5) emergency hint, (6) pre-processor hints
Implement build_system_prompt(pets, session_summary, hints, emergency_hint) function
Implement build_messages(recent_messages, user_message, images) function
Load session_summary from DB instead of last 20 raw messages
Fall back to last 5 raw messages if no summary exists yet
Write test to verify prompt structure and token reduction
Run tests: pytest tests/ -v
Commit

description: Backend: Create tool_guide.py — decision tree + enhanced tool descriptions
steps: Create backend/app/agents/tool_guide.py with TOOL_DECISION_TREE string constant

Write decision tree: user reports event→create_calendar_event, asks about past→query, wants reminder→create_reminder, pet info→update_pet_profile, delete→delete_*, find nearby→search_places, emergency→trigger_emergency, just chatting→no tool
Enhance every tool description in tools.py: add usage scenario, anti-patterns, key constraints
Add trigger_emergency tool to TOOL_DEFINITIONS: {message, action: find_er|call_vet|first_aid}
Add trigger_emergency executor in tools.py that returns card type='emergency'
Write test to verify all tool descriptions have scenario+anti-pattern
Run tests: pytest tests/ -v
Commit

description: Backend: Refactor emergency.py — keyword hint injection instead of direct SSE
steps: Modify detect_emergency() to return {detected: bool, keywords: list[str]} instead of just bool
Add build_emergency_hint(keywords) function that generates prompt hint string
Remove direct SSE emergency event emission from chat router
Instead inject emergency hint into prompt via build_system_prompt()
Keep dual-model routing: if keywords detected, use emergency_model
Update chat router to use new emergency flow
Write test: verify hint generation, verify no direct SSE emission
Run tests: pytest tests/ -v
Commit

description: Backend: Implement executor.py — independent sub-agent for tool execution
steps: Create backend/app/agents/executor.py
Implement ExecutorAgent class with execute(task, context, available_tools) method
Non-streaming LLM call with minimal context (task description + tool definitions only)
Return structured JSON: {success, tool, arguments, card, summary} or {needs_confirm, tool, description}
Handle destructive operations: detect delete_* tools, return needs_confirm instead of executing
Handle validation errors: validate_tool_args before execution, retry once on failure
Add EXECUTOR_MODEL setting to config.py
Write test: tests/test_executor.py — mock LLM, verify structured output, confirm gate
Run test: pytest tests/test_executor.py -v
Commit

description: Backend: Implement orchestrator.py — main agent with 3-path routing
steps: Create backend/app/agents/orchestrator.py
Implement OrchestratorAgent class with run(message, context, on_token, on_card) method
Path A (pure chat): no tools needed, stream response directly
Path B (single task): orchestrator calls tool itself via fast path, no executor
Path C (multi task): parse tasks, dispatch parallel executors via asyncio.gather()
Collect executor results, handle needs_confirm (store pending action + push confirm card)
Generate final streaming response summarizing all results
Add ORCHESTRATOR_MODEL setting to config.py
Write test: tests/test_orchestrator.py — mock LLM, verify 3 paths, verify parallel dispatch
Run test: pytest tests/test_orchestrator.py -v
Commit

description: Backend: Refactor chat router to use new Orchestrator + context pipeline
steps: Update routers/chat.py _event_generator to use new pipeline
Replace old ChatAgent with OrchestratorAgent
Add asyncio.gather() for parallel preprocessing: load_pets, load_messages, load_session_summary, pre_process, emergency_check
Build prompt using prompts_v2.build_system_prompt()
Wire on_token and on_card callbacks to SSE queue
After response: async trigger context_agent summary if needed
Keep confirm-action endpoint working with new executor flow
Run all tests: pytest tests/ -v
Commit

description: Backend: Downgrade pre_processor to hint mode + implement speculative execution
steps: Modify pre_processor.py: change format_actions_for_prompt() to generate hint format instead of MUST-EXECUTE format
New hint format: '💡 系统检测到以下可能的意图（仅供参考）: ...'
Remove tool_choice='required' logic — always use tool_choice='auto'
Create backend/app/agents/speculative.py
Implement speculative_execute(actions, db, user_id) — execute high-confidence non-destructive actions without commit
Implement confirm_or_rollback(speculative_results, actual_results, db) — commit if match, rollback if mismatch
Wire speculative execution into chat router Phase 1 (parallel with LLM call)
Write test: tests/test_speculative.py — verify execute-without-commit, verify rollback
Run tests: pytest tests/ -v
Commit

description: Integration test: full Agent V2 pipeline end-to-end
steps: Write tests/test_agent_v2_integration.py
Test pure chat path: send greeting, verify streaming response, no tools called
Test single task path: send '三妹吃了狗粮', verify create_calendar_event executed, card returned
Test multi task path: send '三妹吃了狗粮，豆豆打了疫苗', verify parallel execution, multiple cards
Test emergency path: send '我家猫中毒了', verify trigger_emergency tool called, emergency card
Test emergency false positive: send '上次中毒是什么时候', verify NO emergency triggered
Test confirm flow: send '删除三妹', verify needs_confirm returned, confirm endpoint works
Test context compression: send 6+ messages, verify context_agent triggered async
Run full suite: pytest tests/ -v
Commit
